overrides.expect: b _ {h} (x) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \frac {1}{6} u ^ {3} & \text {for x\in(x_{h} ,x_{h + 1})}, \quad u = (x - x _ {h}) / \delta \\ \frac {1}{6} (1 + 3 u + 3 u ^ {2} - 3 u ^ {3}) & \text {for x\in(x_{h + 1} ,x_{h + 2})}, \quad u = (x - x _ {h + 1}) / \delta \\ \frac {1}{6} (4 - 6 u ^ {2} + 3 u ^ {3}) & \text {for x\in(x_{h + 2} ,x_{h + 3})}, \quad u = (x - x _ {h + 2}) / \delta \\ \frac {1}{6} (1 - 3 u + 3 u ^ {2} - u ^ {3}) & \text {for x\in(x_{h + 3} ,x_{h + 4})}, \quad u = (x - x _ {h + 3}) / \delta \\ 0 & \text {otherwise.} \end{array} \right.
